category_sources: source_facts.description says dwarfs is a fast high-compression read-only file system; official GitHub README describes DwarFS as a read-only filesystem focused on high compression.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses DwarFS capitalization.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains quick start, usage, filesystem format, and tool documentation references.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a high-compression read-only filesystem; official README describes DwarFS, mkdwarfs, dwarfsck, dwarfsextract, and FUSE usage.
